highlights: Global markets impacted by Iran conflict: S&P 500 down, oil prices surged above $100.
U.S. Treasury yields climb; Federal Reserve maintains cautious interest rate stance.
Portsmouth Consortium launched for Ohio-based energy/AI infrastructure project.
Major exhibitions opening: 'Monet and Venice' (San Francisco), 'New Humans' (New York).
Aurora Athena March Fine Art Auction features Warhol, Korovin, and Fechin.
Local art fairs: Grosse Pointe Fine Art Fair and Naples Downtown Art Fair underway.
